_comment: Ratchet baseline for scripts/check_grounding.py. Lists kind: contract docs that do not yet declare 'evidence:' in front matter. New docs not on this list that lack the field fail CI; docs that gain the field can be removed from this list (the gate prints an info-level 'ratchet opportunity' to remind the maintainer). Per-doc rigor passes ratchet this list down toward zero. Do not add new entries by hand — the gate names them in error output.
